name: Very Vanilla Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl combine cream cheese, tofu, sugar replacement, vanilla-flavored liqueur, cornstarch, and vanilla extract.
2. Beat with an electric mixer until smooth.
3. Stir in egg whites.
4. Pour the cream cheese mixture over the crust.
5. Bake at 225°F for 1 hour and 20 minutes or until the center no longer looks wet or shiny.
6. Turn off the oven; remove the cake and run a knife around the inside edge of the pan.
7. Return the cake to the oven for an additional 2 hours.
8. Chill, uncovered, overnight.
9. Serve with fresh sliced fruit.
